name: Old School Runescape
description: The best retro fantasy MMORPG on the planet.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Starting Area
options.description: Which chunks are available at the start.

options.label: Brutal Grinds
options.description: Whether to allow skill tasks without having reasonable access to the usual skill training path.

options.label: Progressive Tasks
options.description: Whether skill tasks should always be generated in order of easiest to hardest.

options.label: Enable Duds
options.description: Whether to include filler "Dud" items that serve no purpose but allow for more tasks in the pool.

options.label: Dud Count
options.description: How many "Dud" items to include in the pool.

options.label: Enable Carepacks
options.description: Whether or not to include useful "Care Pack" items that allow you to trade over specific items.

options.label: Max Combat Level
options.description: The highest combat level of monster to possibly be assigned as a task.

options.label: Max Combat Tasks
options.description: The maximum number of Combat Tasks to possibly be assigned.

options.label: Combat Task Weight
options.description: How much to favor generating combat tasks over other types of task.

options.label: Max Prayer Level
options.description: The highest Prayer requirement of any task generated.

options.label: Max Prayer Tasks
options.description: The maximum number of Prayer Tasks to possibly be assigned.

options.label: Prayer Task Weight
options.description: How much to favor generating Prayer tasks over other types of task.

options.label: Max Magic Level
options.description: The highest Magic requirement of any task generated.

options.label: Max Magic Tasks
options.description: The maximum number of Magic Tasks to possibly be assigned.

options.label: Magic Task Weight
options.description: How much to favor generating Magic tasks over other types of task.

options.label: Max Runecraft Level
options.description: The highest Runecraft requirement of any task generated.

options.label: Max Runecraft Tasks
options.description: The maximum number of Runecraft Tasks to possibly be assigned.

options.label: Runecraft Task Weight
options.description: How much to favor generating Runecraft tasks over other types of task.

options.label: Max Crafting Level
options.description: The highest Crafting requirement of any task generated.

options.label: Max Crafting Tasks
options.description: The maximum number of Crafting Tasks to possibly be assigned.

options.label: Crafting Task Weight
options.description: How much to favor generating Crafting tasks over other types of task.

options.label: Max Mining Level
options.description: The highest Mining requirement of any task generated.

options.label: Max Mining Tasks
options.description: The maximum number of Mining Tasks to possibly be assigned.

options.label: Mining Task Weight
options.description: How much to favor generating Mining tasks over other types of task.

options.label: Max Smithing Level
options.description: The highest Smithing requirement of any task generated.

options.label: Max Smithing Tasks
options.description: The maximum number of Smithing Tasks to possibly be assigned.

options.label: Smithing Task Weight
options.description: How much to favor generating Smithing tasks over other types of task.

options.label: Max Fishing Level
options.description: The highest Fishing requirement of any task generated.

options.label: Max Fishing Tasks
options.description: The maximum number of Fishing Tasks to possibly be assigned.

options.label: Fishing Task Weight
options.description: How much to favor generating Fishing tasks over other types of task.

options.label: Max Cooking Level
options.description: The highest Cooking requirement of any task generated.

options.label: Max Cooking Tasks
options.description: The maximum number of Cooking Tasks to possibly be assigned.

options.label: Cooking Task Weight
options.description: How much to favor generating Cooking tasks over other types of task.

options.label: Max Firemaking Level
options.description: The highest Firemaking requirement of any task generated.

options.label: Max Firemaking Tasks
options.description: The maximum number of Firemaking Tasks to possibly be assigned.

options.label: Firemaking Task Weight
options.description: How much to favor generating Firemaking tasks over other types of task.

options.label: Max Woodcutting Level
options.description: The highest Woodcutting requirement of any task generated.

options.label: Max Woodcutting Tasks
options.description: The maximum number of Woodcutting Tasks to possibly be assigned.

options.label: Woodcutting Task Weight
options.description: How much to favor generating Woodcutting tasks over other types of task.

options.label: Minimum General Tasks
options.description: How many guaranteed general progression tasks to be assigned (total level, total XP, etc.).

options.label: General Task Weight
options.description: How much to favor generating General tasks over other types of task.
